published_title: Insurance without Commitment: Evidence from the ACA Marketplaces
authors: Rebecca Diamond; Michael J. Dickstein; Timothy McQuade; Petra Persson
note: Retitled 'Insurance without Commitment: Evidence from the ACA Marketplaces' (NBER WP 24668). Timothy McQuade's research page (sites.google.com/view/timothymcquade/research) states 'Reject and Resubmit, Quarterly Journal of Economics' -> counts as R&R per rules. Dickstein's site (michaeljdickstein.com/research, dated June 2026) lists it plainly under Working Papers with no status; most-advanced verified status is R&R at QJE.

authors: Keaton S. Miller; Amil Petrin; Robert Town; Michael Chernew
note: NBER WP 25616 (2019). Keaton Miller's research page labels it 'Revise and Resubmit' without naming a journal, while coauthors list it as a working paper. Under this project's rule that an R&R must name its target journal, it remains classified as working paper (rechecked Jul 2026).

published_title: Retirement Policy and Annuity Market Equilibria: Evidence from Chile
note: Retitled 'Retirement Policy and Annuity Market Equilibria: Evidence from Chile' (NBER WP 26285). Gaston Illanes's website (sites.northwestern.edu/gil208) states 'Revision requested at Econometrica' -> R&R at Econometrica. Earlier circulated as CRR WP 2019-2 under the conference title.

authors: Pietro Tebaldi; Alexander Torgovitsky; Hanbin V. Yang
note: Published in Econometrica, Vol. 91(1), Jan 2023, pp. 107-146 (DOI 10.3982/ECTA17215). Confirmed via Econometric Society/Wiley publisher pages.

published_title: How to Get Away with Merger: Stealth Consolidation and Its Real Effects on US Dialysis
note: Retitled to '...Its Real Effects on US Dialysis'. Wollmann's website (sites.google.com/view/thomaswollmann) lists 'Journal of Political Economy (forthcoming)' as of May 2026; accepted ~Oct 2025. NBER WP 27274. Distinct from his earlier AER:Insights 2019 paper 'Stealth Consolidation: Evidence from the Hart-Scott-Rodino Act'.

NBER WP 24349 (2018); a short version appeared in Proceedings of the 2019 ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC'19), but that is a conference proceeding not a journal. Ostrovsky's Stanford site (web.stanford.edu/~ost) still lists it under 'Working papers' with no journal. No peer-reviewed journal publication found.

published_title: Competition in Network Industries: Evidence from the Rwandan Mobile Phone Network
note: Published in RAND Journal of Economics, Vol. 53(1), Spring 2022, pp. 200-225 (DOI 10.1111/1756-2171.12405). Title changed to include 'Rwandan Mobile Phone Network'. Confirmed via Wiley.

published_title: Market-expanding or Market-stealing? Competition with network effects in bike-sharing
authors: Guangyu Cao; Ginger Zhe Jin; Xi Weng; Li-An Zhou
note: Published in RAND Journal of Economics, Vol. 52(4), Dec 2021, pp. 778-814 (DOI 10.1111/1756-2171.12391). Confirmed via Wiley/RePEc.

authors: Yuyu Chen; Mitsuru Igami; Masayuki Sawada; Mo Xiao
note: Published in RAND Journal of Economics, Vol. 52(4), 2021, pp. 884-916 (DOI 10.1111/1756-2171.12395). Confirmed via Wiley/RePEc.

published_title: Industrial Policy Implementation: Empirical Evidence from China's Shipbuilding Industry
authors: Panle Jia Barwick; Myrto Kalouptsidi; Nahim B. Zahur
note: Retitled 'Industrial Policy Implementation: Empirical Evidence from China's Shipbuilding Industry'. Published in Review of Economic Studies, Vol. 92(6), 2025, p. 3611+ (Oxford Academic). Originally NBER WP 26075 / CEPR DP13889.

authors: Sumit Agarwal; John Grigsby; Ali Hortacsu; Gregor Matvos; Amit Seru; Vincent Yao
note: Published in Econometrica, Vol. 92(4), July 2024, pp. 1195-1231 (DOI 10.3982/ECTA18554). Confirmed via Econometric Society/Wiley.

authors: Mark L. Egan; Gregor Matvos; Amit Seru
note: Accepted at Review of Economic Studies; version of record available at Oxford Academic (DOI 10.1093/restud/rdaf010, advance article dated 9 Feb 2025). Stanford GSB lists it as a Journal Article. Specific print volume/issue not yet confirmed; treating as published (2025 advance access).

authors: Yeon-Koo Che; Dong Woo Hahm; YingHua He
note: Dong Woo Hahm's research page (dongwoohahm.com/research) states '[Revise and Resubmit at Journal of Political Economy]'. Circulated as SSRN 4580093 / arXiv 2309.14297 (2023, rev. Sept 2024).

authors: Emmanuel Dhyne; Amil Petrin; Valerie Smeets; Frederic Warzynski
note: NBER WP 30784 (2022). Frederic Warzynski's site lists it under 'Working papers/work in progress' (April 2024 version, 'new version coming soon'); Amil Petrin's site also lists it as a working paper. No journal named on any CV; not published/forthcoming/R&R.
